reviews.comment:
Acompañé a mi mujer a hacer un trámite que en Bragado no puede hacerse porque no hay ACA.
La oficina incomoda, solo entran cuatro personas.
Muy buena atención de quien nos hizo el trámite, aunque yo (que vivo en CABA) estaba ansioso porque termine para irnos.
No me acostumbro a los tiempos pausados y muy hablados del interior. Un trámite de 10/15 min se convierten en eternos 40/50.

(Translated by Google)
I accompanied my wife to complete a procedure that can't be done in Bragado because there's no ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) office there.
The office is cramped; only four people fit inside at a time. The person who helped us was very helpful, although I (who live in Buenos Aires) was anxious for it to be over so we could leave.
I can't get used to the slow, conversational pace of things in the provinces. A 10-15 minute procedure feels like an eternity of 40-50 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/549693288320464901/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvZ1lEd3hnRRAB
